  ⏵⏵ auto mode on (shift+tab to cycle) · esc to interrupt
● Bash(grep -iE "server is temporarily limiting|rate limited")
  contains my prose discussing the banner pattern: the daemon
  watches for "API Error" lines, but mentions of API errors
  in code comments, READMEs or grep output should not match
  unless they are the actual live banner format.

> waiting for input
